primary_claim: CLAF++ + Symbolic improves AUROC by 3.56 percentage points over AE only and reduces false alarm rate by 11.69 points.
meta_claim: The meta-learner improves AUROC by -0.15 percentage points over soft ensemble fusion, showing that learned stacking is the primary contributor.
symbolic_claim: The symbolic enhancement changes AUROC by 0.39 points and false alarm rate by 0.00 points relative to the neural meta model.
